---
name: gnostr-react
description: React to an event.

# react

Use this skill for reacting to an event.

## Verified notes

- `cargo run --bin gnostr -- react --help` shows the live flags.
- `gnostr -V` should be checked when behavior differs across environments.

## Common commands

```bash
cargo run --bin gnostr -- react --help
gnostr react --help
```

## Rules

- Keep the target event explicit.
